question: What are the two distinct powers of a Draconian 'Fire-Heart' gem?

answers.ground_truth: A Draconian 'Fire-Heart' gem generates 'Molten-Streams' and produces 'Heat-Shields'.
answers.original: Fire-Heart gems are capable of generating Molten-Streams and Heat-Shields.
answers.perturbed: I don't have enough information to answer that question.

ops.description: Chrono-Weavers train at the Temporal College to hone their skills.

entities.name: Fire-Heart Gem
entities.description: Fire-Heart gems are Draconian artifacts capable of generating Molten-Streams and Heat-Shields, found only in active volcano cores.

entities.name: Crimson Glow
entities.description: Fire-Heart gems pulse with an internal crimson glow.

entities.name: Molten-Streams
entities.description: Molten-Streams are streams of liquid fire generated by Fire-Heart gems, reaching temperatures of several thousand degrees.

relations.description: Fire-Heart gems produce Heat-Shields, protective barriers of superheated air.
Fire-Heart gems generate Molten-Streams of liquid fire.
Fire-Heart gems pulse with an internal crimson glow.
Fire-Heart gems are exclusively found in active volcano cores.
